description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the node:10.11.0 Docker image, caches the node_modules directory, and runs npm install before each job. Define a single stage called deploy and a pages job that runs in this stage. The pages job should execute the commands: CI=true npm run build, rm -rf public, and mv build public; then publish the public/ directory as a pages artifact and only run on the master branch.
